name: Ukrainian Cold Fruit Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the water, cinnamon, lemon juice, bread crumbs, and lemon rind in a large pot.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Add the fruits and reduce heat. Simmer for 25 minutes.
4. Puree the mixture using a blender.
5. Add the jam, wine, and cranberry juice. Mix well.
6. Refrigerate until well chilled.
7. Serve when properly chilled. Note: Apple dumplings may be served in this soup.
